A.rationale: Fixed routing in framework.py AND handlers.py so DELETE actually dispatches; mirrors ok/err/get_item; surfaces a real guard-vs-del race.

B.rationale: Made route method-aware and matched conventions; explicitly names str.format/ok/err fidelity and flags the dispatch lookup site needing the method too.

C.rationale: Mirrors conventions and correctly diagnoses the path-shadowing trap, but only edited handlers.py—left the routing unfixed, so the handler stays shadowed.

D.rationale: Consistent ok(item) shape and good method-dispatch diagnosis, but only touched handlers.py; framework routing left broken so DELETE never matches.

notes: A and B actually fixed the method-aware routing (both files); C and D only flagged the path-collision trap, shipping a shadowed handler. B edges A: explicit convention-fidelity and clean lookup-site flag.
